goog.module('recordclass.RecordClass.EmptyRecord$impl');

const Record = goog.require('java.lang.Record$impl');
const $Util = goog.require('nativebootstrap.Util$impl');

/**
 * @final
 */
class EmptyRecord extends Record {
 /** @protected @nodts */
 constructor() {
  super();
 }
 /** @nodts @return {!EmptyRecord} */
 static $create__() {
  EmptyRecord.$clinit();
  let $instance = new EmptyRecord();
  $instance.$ctor__recordclass_RecordClass_EmptyRecord__void();
  return $instance;
 }
 /** @nodts */
 $ctor__recordclass_RecordClass_EmptyRecord__void() {
  this.$ctor__java_lang_Record__void();
  $J2CL_PRESERVE$();
 }
 /** @nodts */
 static $clinit() {
  EmptyRecord.$clinit = () =>{};
  EmptyRecord.$loadModules();
  Record.$clinit();
 }
 /** @nodts @return {boolean} */
 static $isInstance(/** ? */ instance) {
  return instance instanceof EmptyRecord;
 }
 
 /** @nodts */
 static $loadModules() {}
}
$Util.$setClassMetadata(EmptyRecord, 'recordclass.RecordClass$EmptyRecord');

exports = EmptyRecord;
